first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the qualitative feedback in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not suggest that the model's assessment was influenced by the redacted name or personal URLs. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's core strengths and the same primary concern (lack of Nest.js experience).
